description: Flags access-key create/delete/update events for a user from _index=sumologic_audit_events, geolocating the source IP via ASN lookup to mark logins outside an expected ASN/geo pattern as exceptions.

Lists create/update/delete configuration actions performed via the Sumo Logic API from _index=sumologic_audit_events, geolocating the calling IP and surfacing per-user, per-subsystem, per-event request counts flagged as normal or exception by location.

Tracks collector creation and deletion events performed via install tokens from _index=sumologic_audit_events, geolocating the source IP and summarizing change counts by token, event, and ASN/geo location for anomaly review.

Tracks collector creation and deletion events registered via legacy access ID/key, UI, or API from _index=sumologic_audit_events, geolocating the source IP and summarizing change counts by user, interface, and ASN/geo location for anomaly review.
